name: Yet Another German Hot Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon in a large, heavy skillet until crisp. Remove the bacon and drain on paper towels.
2. Crumble the bacon and reserve the bacon fat.
3. Dissolve the cornstarch in the water.
4. Saute the onion and celery in the reserved bacon fat over medium heat for about 5 minutes, until the onions are translucent.
5. Add the salt, sugar, pepper, dissolved cornstarch to the skillet.
6. Add the vinegar and bring to a boil over medium heat for three minutes.
7. Add the hot potatoes and crumbled bacon, stirring gently. Serve hot.
